arts.ttl: RFEF And Tebas Respond to Real Madrid’s Formal Complaint Following Espanyol Controversy
arts.sum: Responses to Real Madrid’s formal complaint to the Royal Spanish Football Federation (RFEF) and the Spanish Sports Council (CSD) regarding recent refereeing decisions have come in fast. In response to Los Blancos’ strongly worded letter, the RFEF has issued an official statement defending the integrity of its refereeing body while emphasizing ongoing efforts to modernize Spanish football officiating.
Photos of the alternate kit set to be made use of by La Liga giants Real Madrid next season have on Monday come to the fore online. And the alleged…

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo Details How He Would Help Kylian Mbappe at Real Madrid
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo sounded off on Kylian Mbappé's start at Real Madrid and revealed how the Frenchman could get even better.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid sends harsh letter to Spanish soccer bosses complaining of ref mistakes
arts.sum: Madrid said in its four-page letter that the performance of the VAR and the officiating crew was “scandalous.” Real Madrid formally complained of refereeing mistakes to the Spanish Football Federation and the country’s top sports authority on Monday.

arts.ttl: Leganes lineup vs. Real Madrid: Predicted XI for Copa del Rey clash with Sergio Gonzalez's availability revealed
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Leganes could line up for Wednesday's Copa del Rey quarter-final against Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid trio train separately from club’s squad
arts.sum: Three leading members of the first-team setup at La Liga giants Real Madrid trained away from the rest of the club’s squad on Monday. Real, of course, are fresh off…
